privacy_boundary: This is not the confidential University of Zimbabwe bill or contract tariff.

official_public_anchor.source: Zimbabwe National Energy Compact, published on the ZERA website
official_public_anchor.source_note: The Compact reports an average tariff of 16.08 USc/kWh and notes that a 21% adjustment took effect on 1 December 2023.

current_public_reasonableness_check.note: Displayed by ZERA for the first 50 domestic units. It is a lower-block residential reference, not an institutional tariff.

study_calibrated_planning_parameters.note: These are equivalent planning rates inferred from the study's January and April cost shares. They are used for scenario comparison only.
